targets.rawSql:
SELECT page_route,
       COUNT(*) AS calls,
       ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS avg_ms,
       ROUND(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(
         GROUP_CONCAT(duration_ms ORDER BY duration_ms),
         ',', CEIL(0.95 * COUNT(*))), ',', -1)) AS p95_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY page_route
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT page_route, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY page_route
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT target, endpoint,
       COUNT(*) AS calls,
       ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS avg_ms,
       ROUND(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(
         GROUP_CONCAT(duration_ms ORDER BY duration_ms),
         ',', CEIL(0.95 * COUNT(*))), ',', -1)) AS p95_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY target, endpoint
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Endpoints called per page (last 24h, max per visit + p95)

targets.rawSql:
WITH per_session AS (
  SELECT session_id, page_route, target, endpoint,
         COUNT(*) AS session_calls
  FROM api_request_log
  WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  GROUP BY session_id, page_route, target, endpoint
),
per_endpoint_visit AS (
  SELECT page_route, target, endpoint,
         MAX(session_calls) AS max_calls
  FROM per_session
  GROUP BY page_route, target, endpoint
),
per_endpoint_dur AS (
  SELECT page_route, target, endpoint,
         ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS avg_ms,
         ROUND(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(
           GROUP_CONCAT(duration_ms ORDER BY duration_ms),
           ',', CEIL(0.95 * COUNT(*))), ',', -1)) AS p95_ms
  FROM api_request_log
  WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  GROUP BY page_route, target, endpoint
)
SELECT v.page_route, v.target, v.endpoint,
       v.max_calls,
       d.avg_ms,
       d.p95_ms
FROM per_endpoint_visit v
JOIN per_endpoint_dur d
  ON d.page_route = v.page_route
 AND d.target = v.target
 AND d.endpoint = v.endpoint
ORDER BY v.page_route, d.p95_ms DESC;

SELECT ts, page_route, target, endpoint, method, status, duration_ms, server_ms
FROM api_request_log
WHERE session_id = '$session_id'
  AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY ts;

list.name: session_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM api_request_log WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100;
list.label: Session
